name: Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and remove stems from the mushroom caps.
2. Chop the mushroom stems and combine with the chopped mushrooms.
3. Add shredded carrots, finely chopped onions, and minced garlic to the mixture.
4. Add bread cubes and season with salt, pepper, and Italian herbs.
5. Place the stuffing mixture in the prepared mushroom caps.
6. Sprinkle with paprika.
7. Cook the stuffed mushrooms in a nonstick frying pan over medium heat until browned and reduced.
8. (Optional) Stir in a handful of lowfat or nondairy cheese and let it melt.
9. Broil the stuffed mushrooms until the tops are browned and the caps begin to release moisture.
10. Serve hot with asparagus spears and sectioned oranges.
